headline: Genuine Parts’s (NYSE:GPC) Q2 CY2026 Sales Beat Estimates
summary: Auto and industrial parts retailer Genuine Parts (NYSE:GPC) reported revenue ahead of Wall Street’s expectations in Q2 CY2026, with sales up 6% year on year to $6.54 billion. Its non-GAAP profit of $2.15 per share was 3.6% above analysts’ consensus estimates.
